title: Gold character
text: Gold character The logical name of a special Uniface character that is used in combination with other characters to represent wildcard characters for queries, subfield separators in Uniface lists, and to invoke runtime Structure editor functions in form components. The character is mapped to a key or key combination (known as the Gold key) in each keyboard translation table. Don't use "... a GOLD ;-separated list" or "GOLD-separated", but "... a list using GOLD ; separators (;)..." Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
